title: EIIAT (EveryItemIsATotem)
description: Turns every item into a totem. Has a blacklist.
body:
# EIIAT
**Turns every item into a totem.**
**This mod was a quick idea because of a video on TikTok. I will not put any further work in it.**


## Config
**EIIAT lets you add items to a blacklist.**
This is done via commands or the config file at (`/config/eiiat_excluded_items.json`)

Replace <item> with your actual item, e.g. minecraft:cobblestone
```command
/eiiat exclude <item> //Blacklist item
/eiiat include <item> //Remove from blacklist
/eiiat get            //List all blacklisted items. Click to remove supported.
```
